rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §31.122 governs election authority office hours during election periods. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects with no overlapping operative requirements.
quote: Sec. 31.122. OFFICE HOURS OF ELECTION AUTHORITY DURING ELECTION PERIOD.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to proposed change.
